subject: Spewpa, a round cocoon-stage Pokemon resting among fallen autumn leaves near a forest floor
description: A round, fluffy white-grey cocoon Pokemon sits quietly on a forest floor blanketed in fallen autumn leaves. The creature's body is simple and orb-like with a small face barely visible at the front. Around it, red-orange and brown leaves are scattered on the ground, and thick brown tree trunks frame the background. Soft warm autumnal light filters through. The mood is still and peaceful.
foreground: Spewpa sitting still among fallen leaves on forest floor
background: tree trunks, scattered autumn leaves, forest floor
